Game: Jungle no Ouja Tar-chan- Sekai Manyu Dai Kakutou no Maki 1994-09-18T00:00:00-07:00 Ta-chan is the king of jungle. He was abandoned in savanna, and has been raised by a chimpanzee, Etekichi. He has a dearest wife, Jane who used to be a top model in New York, but now she looks…Anyway, to protect animals from poachers, Ta-chan is fighting against them with his disciple, Pedro, and a master of Chinese martial arts, Ryo. 1 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/71242651-45af-446e-a630-e19aec62ab86.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/733b8d37-d237-4299-9809-1be009bdecf2.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/2747e3cf-f356-4f4c-aae1-1217f93e3f63.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/a17691aa-bd7c-4ced-a91b-72423ef16884.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/b5c4088a-0f17-40e9-99ea-01ffc653da65.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/ded8b99c-729c-4c18-b991-4e267b9854a5.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/06066ebe-150d-4cb0-9659-5872d70ddef9.png Action Kuusoukagaku Bandai
